attacking_style: Opportunistic counter-attacker willing to go long (39km out) when team tactics require it, but shows tactical restraint in headwinds and doomed moves. Demonstrated unexpected climbing acceleration in final 2-3km.
team_tactics: Used as tactical wildcard for long-range counterattacks when favorites neutralize each other. Deployed as leadout/positioning specialist in sprint finales (500m marks) despite team lacking pure sprinter to finish.
terrain_preference: Classics specialist with proven cobbled credentials (Omloop, Flanders appearances) but showed surprising climbing ability matching GC specialists in final 2.5km. Favors tactical positioning over pure power.
vulnerability: Abandons committed efforts when headwinds expose breakaways. Team roles often position him for sprints without finish capability, wasting positioning work. Sits between domestique and finisher without clear win conditions.
key_patterns: Tactical intelligence over commitment: sits up in headwind at Omloop rather than wasting energy (2 instances of calculated restraint)
Used for long-range gambits when team lacks sprint firepower (Flanders 39km, Tirreno leadout)
Climbing form exceeds typical classics specialist profile (matched Hindley, competed in UAE Tour)
Positioning specialist in final kilometers but team lacks finisher to capitalize on his work
form_trajectory: neutral: Mixed signals with strong climbing shown in 2020 UAE Tour but subsequent 2020-2021 roles reduced to tactical domestique work rather than personal results
built_from: 2021 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
